_comments.deployerPrincipalId: REQUIRED — supply at deploy time, do NOT commit. Use one of: (a) az CLI: --parameters deployerPrincipalId=$(az ad signed-in-user show --query id -o tsv); (b) PowerShell: --parameters deployerPrincipalId=$Env:DEPLOYER_PRINCIPAL_ID; (c) deploy script (Step 14). For a service principal deployer, also override deployerPrincipalType to 'ServicePrincipal'.
